title: Cell culture, transfection, immunocytochemistry, and imaging
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9n583","text":"This protocol is to help with the maintenance, transfection, immunocytochemistry, and imaging of adherent mammalian cells associated with the publication DOI above.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Culture COS-7 or HeLa (wild-type, parental control, and all knock-in lines) cells at 37 °C and 5 %, CO2 in DMEM (Gibco, #11965118) containing 10 %, FBS , 1 millimolar (mM), sodium pyruvate , 100 U/mL, penicillin , 100 mg/mL, streptomycin (Gibco/LifeTech, #15140-122) and 2 millimolar (mM), L-glutamine (Gibco/LifeTech, #25030-081). DMEM, high glucose Thermo Fisher Catalog #11965118 Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL) Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15140122 L-Glutamine (200 mM) Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #25030081

Culture hTERT-RPE1 (wild-type, parental control, and all knockout lines) cells at 37 °C and 5 %, CO2 in DMEM/F12 (Gibco, #11330057) containing 10 %, FBS , 1 millimolar (mM), sodium pyruvate , 100 U/mL, penicillin , 100 mg/mL, streptomycin and 2 millimolar (mM), L-glutamine . DMEM/F-12, HEPES Thermo Fisher Catalog #11330057 Note: For general maintenance, when cells reache 80-90% confluency, detach from the dish with Trypsin (Gibco, #25300054) and dilute 1:10-20 in a new dish. Trypsin-EDTA (0.05%), phenol red Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #25300054
For live-cell imaging experiments, seed cells on glass-bottom dishes (MatTek; 35mm) at the following concentrations: COS-7, 8.5x10 4 ; HeLa, 7.5x10 4 ; RPE1, 1.0x10 5 .

Allow cells to adhere for 8-24 hours before being transiently transfected using FuGene HD (Promega) following manufacturer’s instructions. Note: Replace Media just before addition of the transfection reagent that contains no antibiotics to lower toxicity.
Incubate transfection reagents with cells for 08:00:00 - 36:00:00 before imaging.

For fixed-cell imaging experiments, seed cells on to glass coverslips (FisherBrand # 12542A) in a well of a 6-well plate (Corning #3516). i. Perform seeding at the following concentrations for all fixed-cell experiments where cells are not additionally transfected: HeLa, 1.5x10 5 ; RPE1, 2.0x10 5 . ii. Perform seeding at the following concentrations for all fixed-cell experiments where cells are additionally transfected: HeLa, 7.5x10 4 ; RPE1, 1.25x10 5 . Perform transfection as described above before fixation.
Just before fixation, wash cells with 1 mL, PBS quickly.
To each well, add 1 mL, fixation buffer + 4% PFA equilibrated at 37 °C . Perform fixation at 37 °C for a total of 00:10:00 .
Remove Fixation solution, and wash cells with TBS three 10-minute washes to ensure the stoppage and removal of fixation solution.
Remove Fixation solution.
Wash cells with TBS for 00:10:00 .
Wash cells with TBS for 00:10:00 .
After the last TBS wash, add 1 mL, solubilization buffer to each well for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .
After solubilization is complete, add 1 mL, AbDil buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .

Dilute antibodies in AbDil buffer. 100 µL, AbDil buffer containing the diluted antibody is used for each coverslip. Pipette the diluted antibody solution as a droplet onto parafilm in a humidity-controlled chamber.
Invert coverslips onto the antibody droplet (cells facing down into solution) and place at 4 °C for 16:00:00 - 24:00:00 .
Move coverslips into individual wells of a clean 6-well plate (cells now facing upwards) and wash three times with PBS wash buffer for 00:10:00 each.
Wash cells with TBS for 00:10:00 .
Move coverslips into individual wells of a clean 6-well plate (cells now facing upwards).
Wash PBS wash buffer for 00:10:00 .
Wash PBS wash buffer for 00:10:00 .
Wash PBS wash buffer for 00:10:00 .

After the final wash, partially dry coverslips using an aspirator and invert (cells facing down) onto a drop of mounting medium (Invitrogen #P36935) on a glass slide (Electron Microscopy Sciences # 4951-001T). (Allow slides to cure as directed by the manufacturer of the mounting medium). ProLong™ Gold Antifade Mountant with DAPI Thermo Fisher Catalog #P36935
After curing, permanently immobilize coverslips onto the glass slide using nail polish (Sally Hansen Advanced Hair and Nail).
Perform all imaging using an Andor Dragonfly system equipped with a plan apochromat objective (60x, 1.4 NA, oil) and a Zyla scientific CMOS camera.
Perform all live-cell imaging at 37 °C and 5 %, CO2 in live cell imaging buffer (Invitrogen #A14291DJ). Live Cell Imaging Solution Thermo Fisher Catalog #A14291DJ
creator: Michael G Hanna
